title: Parent item is null when binding image
symptom: When trying to bind an image from a parent list, the system indicates that the parent item is null, despite being able to pull data from the parent list.
applies_when: Using a parent container to display data
Binding an image from a related data type
not_this_if: The parent container is correctly set up and displays data without issues
root_cause: The error occurs when the binding logic does not correctly reference the parent item, often due to incorrect filtering or data lookup methods that fail to establish the relationship between the parent and child data.
fix_steps: Use a lookup formula instead of a filter for data binding.
agent_instruction: Replace the filter method with a lookup formula to correctly bind the image.
